testcase.name: E2E media gallery upload › upload image to gallery shows success toast

failure.message: uploadImage.spec.ts:15:7 upload image to gallery shows success toast

testcase.failure:
[e2e] › e2e/media/gallery/uploadImage.spec.ts:15:7 › E2E media gallery upload › upload image to gallery shows success toast
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('[data-testid="new-login-page-login-card-form-email-input"]').first() Expected: visible Error: element(s) not found

at e2e/pages/loginPage.ts:47
45 | await this.goto(baseUrl); 46 | await this.page.waitForLoadState('networkidle'); > 47 | await expect(this.usernameInput).toBeVisible({ timeout: 15_000 }); | ^ 48 | await expect(this.passwordInput).toBeVisible({ timeout: 15_000 }); 49 | } 50 | at LoginPage.open (/Users/alex/myrepos/node-merged-kal/tests/e2e/pages/loginPage.ts:47:38) at Object.exports.test._test.test.extend.adminUserPage.scope (/Users/alex/myrepos/node-merged-kal/tests/e2e/fixtures.ts:73:5)
